text: The app just keeps freezing when I try to upload something, but I don't know the version I'm using.
I ordered a blue backpack but got a red one. Also, why is the shipping so slow? I need it for my trip next week.

I’ve been trying to figure out if somehow I missed something, but does the app actually have a feature for tracking my orders? It seems like everything is out of order, and I can’t tell if I need to update something or if it’s just me.
I think I was charged for something I didn’t get. It’s been a while and not sure what to do now.

I wanted to bring to your attention that I've been experiencing some issues with my subscription. It seems that I received a notification about an auto-renewal I wasn't expecting. This situation has caused me some confusion, and I'm uncertain about the next steps. Could you please clarify this for me? Thank you.
I received a different item than what I ordered. I don’t want it anymore. But I placed the order last week, and it’s not what I thought I'd get. Can I get a refund?

I was given an estimate for a service that is now far exceeded, and I'm unsure why there has been no follow-up. Also, I was informed that my feedback would be considered, but I have yet to receive any acknowledgment of that process.
I am experiencing an issue where the application seems unresponsive without any clear indication of what might be wrong. Can you provide guidance on how to proceed?

I've been struggling with the app lately; it keeps freezing and then crashes without warning. I'm not sure what's causing it, but it's really upsetting. I've tried everything I can think of, but nothing seems to help.
I can't seem to access my account. I thought it was the password, but I reset it. Still locked out. What next?
I think I updated my password but now I can't log in, says my account's locked or something?
I can't log in. Something's off with my account.
I am encountering an issue with my account access after my last password reset, it seems to be malfunctioning, can you assist me with this matter?

I've been trying to get help with my order for days, but it seems like every time I reach out, I get stuck in a loop of responses. I just want to express my frustration with how little progress has been made, and honestly, I feel like this is a common experience. Other customers must be feeling the same way, right? It’s like there's a wall between us and actual solutions. Can you please help me understand what's happening?

Hello, I'm experiencing a rather perplexing issue with accessing my account. I recently changed my password, but I seem to get a strange message regarding my profile that doesn't make sense. By the way, I read online somewhere about similar cases, and I wonder if those are related. It’s really tricky to describe exactly what's happening, but I have a feeling it might have something to do with the recent updates. I hope you can help me figure it out, as I'm not sure what to do next, and any information would be appreciated. Thank you!
I was wondering if there are any plans to introduce an offline mode for the app in the next updates. It would be really helpful for users who travel a lot.
